description: Multiple field additions in a single request are batched into one patch-aem-page-content call — not one call per field
userMessage: Add a first name field and a last name field to /content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1

rubric.description: The model makes only ONE call to patch-aem-page-content that includes both field additions in a single patch array — not two separate patch calls
The single patch call contains add operations for both the first name and last name fields
